title: Flint
description: Core library for DiamondFire mods, allowing them to share systems and a common codebase.
body:
![Flint banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1b2c0863e38326956ded04c4117f949fc331be3_0.webp)

Read the [GitHub README](https://github.com/DFOnline/Flint) for more information!

## Rolling Releases
Flint updates on a rolling release, the latest version will always be the latest commit.
